 Hi Robert

 FreeBSD 8.2-RELEASE #0: Thu Feb 17 02:41:41 UTC 2011 -- GNERIC amd 64
 
 
 re0:  <RealTek 8101E/8102E/8102EL/8103E PCIe 10/100baseTX) port =
 0x1000-0x10ff mem
          0xf0004000-0xf0004fff,0xf0000000-0xf0003fff irq 16 at device =
 0.0 on pci2
 re0: Using 1 MSI messages
 re0: Chip rev. 0x40800000
 re0: MAC rev. 0x0000000=20
 re0: Unknown H/W revision: 0x40800000
 device_attach: re0 attach  returned 6
 
 
 regards.
 --eh.
